queries.result: Recommended Crops: Cassava, Yam, Cocoa, Rice
Practice deep mulching, grow cover crop cowpeas, small-compost application.

en.hero_title: Smart Farming Advice for Nigerian Farmers
en.hero_subtitle: Get localized AI crop recommendations, smart planting calendars, and real-time weather alerts delivered in your preferred language.
en.section_weather_desc: Stay ahead of climate shifts with real-time weather alerts and seasonal notifications for your farm.
en.section_crop_desc: Select your state and farming season to find the most profitable and high-yielding crops suited for your soil.
en.section_calendar_desc: Find the optimal window to sow your seeds based on historical data and real-time climate forecasts.
en.section_yield_desc: Estimate your harvest output in bags (50kg) based on farm size and crop type under standard practices.
en.section_soil_desc: Input basic soil observations to receive low-cost, organic soil restoration practices.
en.section_prices_desc: Native agricultural market prices scraped directly from regional centers to help you sell at the best value.
en.section_ussd_desc: Millions of smallholder farmers use basic feature phones. Test how they interact with Seedorra using offline USSD codes and SMS alerts.
en.ussd_dial_inst: Dial the Seedorra USSD code below to launch the offline menu on the simulator screen:
en.admin_desc: Modify website copy, adjust parameters, and upload media files below.
en.admin_upload_inst: Upload a new image from your computer to replace current assets:
en.onboarding_welcome_desc: Empowering Nigerian smallholder farmers with intelligent, localized crop and climate advisories.
en.onboarding_weather_desc: Receive critical rainfall warnings, heat waves, and dry spells direct to your phone in your native language.
en.onboarding_crops_desc: Match the best seeds to your specific state and season, and get optimal sowing window calendars to maximize harvest.
en.onboarding_soil_desc: Diagnose your soil color and drainage to receive low-cost organic improvements and estimate crop yield.
en.modal_login_desc: Enter your name and password to access your custom dashboard. Admin users, enter admin credentials.
en.modal_register_desc: Create your Seedorra profile to receive localized daily SMS updates and crop predictions.

yo.hero_title: Imọran Àgbà Kíkún fún Àwọn Àgbẹ̀ Nàìjíríà
yo.hero_subtitle: Gba awọn iṣeduro irugbin ti o ni agbara AI, awọn akoko gbingbin to dara julọ, ati awọn ikilo oju-ọjọ ni ede rẹ.
yo.section_weather_desc: Duro niwaju awọn iyipada oju-ọjọ pẹlu awọn ikilo oju-ọjọ akoko-gidi fun oko rẹ.
yo.label_status_good: Ipo ti o dara fun gbingbin
yo.section_crop_desc: Yan ipinlẹ rẹ ati akoko gbingbin lati wa awọn irugbin to dara julọ fun ile rẹ.
yo.text_recommended_crops: Awọn irugbin ti a ṣeduro fun ọ
yo.section_calendar_desc: Wa akoko to dara julọ lati gbin awọn irugbin rẹ ti o da lori oju-ọjọ ati awọn asọtẹlẹ.
yo.section_yield_desc: Ṣe iṣiro iye apo (50kg) ti iwọ yoo kórè ti o da lori iwọn ilẹ oko rẹ.
yo.section_soil_desc: Dahun awọn ibeere ti o rọrun lori ile rẹ lati gba awọn iṣe to dara julọ ti ko gbowolori.
yo.section_prices_desc: Awọn idiyele ọja gidi ti a mu jade lati awọn ọja agbegbe lati ran ọ lọwọ lati ta daradara.
yo.section_ussd_desc: Ọpọlọpọ awọn àgbẹ̀ lo foonu kekere. Dán bi wọ́n ṣe n ba Seedorra sọrọ wò pẹlu USSD ati SMS lori foonu simulator yii.
yo.ussd_dial_inst: Tẹ bọtini lati tẹ koodu USSD Seedorra lati bẹrẹ eto simulator foonu:
yo.admin_desc: Ṣatunṣe awọn ọrọ oju-iwe ati gbe faili media si ori oko rẹ.
yo.admin_upload_inst: Gbe aworan tuntun lati kọnputa rẹ:
yo.onboarding_welcome_desc: Ifọwọsowọpọ pẹlu awọn àgbẹ̀ kekere ti Nigeria lati pese imọran irugbin ati awọn ikilo oju-ọjọ.
yo.onboarding_weather_desc: Gba awọn ikilo ojo ati gbígbẹ taara sori foonu rẹ ni ede abinibi rẹ.
yo.onboarding_crops_desc: Yan irugbin ti o dara julọ...
yo.onboarding_soil_desc: Diagnose your soil color and drainage to receive low-cost organic improvements and estimate crop yield.
yo.modal_login_desc: Enter your name and password to access your custom dashboard. Admin users, enter admin credentials.
yo.modal_register_desc: Create your Seedorra profile to receive localized daily SMS updates and crop predictions.
